  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AdrenalSyringe
    An equipment item that provides a burst of healing or emergency power.
    DataFragment
    An equipment item providing incremental tech bonuses.
    DeepestVoid
    An equipment item that utilizes black hole or gravity mechanics.
    Doomsday
    An equipment item that unleashes massive destruction when triggered.
    EngineOverload
    An equipment item that temporarily boosts speed and damage.
    FinalWeapon
    An extremely powerful equipment item representing the ultimate arsenal.
    HexEditor
    An equipment item that modifies or corrupts enemy data.
    MagneticRepulsor
    An equipment item that pushes enemies away from the player.
    MagnetRing
    An equipment item that increases the pickup range for collectables.
    MutatedBrain
    An equipment item that enhances skill effectiveness or reduces cooldowns.
    NecroticHeart
    An equipment item that grants power at the cost of health or causes decay.
    NeuroAmplifier
    An equipment item that boosts mental or magical capabilities.
    ParasiticGas
    An equipment item that emits a toxic cloud damaging nearby enemies.
    PhantomDrive
    An equipment item that provides evasion or phasing abilities.
    ServoMotor
    An equipment item that enhances movement speed or attack rate.
    SoulHarvester
    An equipment item that gains strength by defeating enemies.
    TitaniumArmor
    A defensive equipment item that reduces incoming damage.
    TungstenPlating
    An equipment item that significantly increases armor and defense.
